sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 32

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 32:1
items.html: (to the question) The essential correction intended in the embryo is the discernment of the association of the quality of judgment with the quality of mercy — that is, to include the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] in the Hey Rishona [first Hey], which is by the raising of NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] to HGT [Hesed, Gevura, Tiferet] in the secret of "three within three." By this, the Malchut below the Yesod of ZA [Zeir Anpin] was included in the Tiferet in him; and it is known that Tiferet is the discernment of Bina of Hassadim, and there she also receives incorporation from the quality of the Yesod. This incorporation is called the correction of lines [Kavim]. For while she is below the Yesod, there is only one line there — just as they emerged in Nekudim one below another in a single line, since only the GAR of Nekudim emerged from the secret of the Hey Tachtona in the Eynaim [eyes], which is the secret of the correction of lines, whereas the ZAT [seven lower ones] emerged only from the Yesod of AK [Adam Kadmon] in the secret of the Vav and Nekuda [point], afterwards, when the Yesod had already received the new Light that split the Parsa — meaning that it annulled the second Tzimtzum [restriction], and the first Tzimtzum returned to its place. Thus the Malchut of ZA stood in the discernment of the first Tzimtzum, and the sweetening of the Hey Rishona had not yet reached her; so she is not yet included in each and every Sefira in the discernment of the left line, but stands beneath them. But when she rises and joins the Hey Rishona, Malchut is then included in each and every Sefira, and two lines are made in every Sefira: one is the essence of the Sefira, and the second is the discernment of the Malchut included there. Now these two lines in every Sefira were made by the ascent of NHY into HGT, for upon her joining the Hey Rishona she was immediately mixed into every Sefira, as is known. And through the incorporation of the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of the embryo, in the secret of the Zivug [coupling] in its mother's innards, a new Zivug emerged there upon the MAN; and the Light of the Zivug and the discernment of the MAN — which are the secret of the Masach [screen] and Aviut [coarseness] that raise Returning Light — are the discernment of the middle line in the Sefirot. And you see how the ascent of NHY to HGT makes the correction of the three lines. However, this ascent too is made only in the discernment of incorporation in the upper Partzuf, for AA [Arich Anpin] himself awakened within himself the discernment of the ascent of NHY to HGT, as written in its place. And this discernment of the correction of lines makes all the Sefirot in the secret of a single domain. (p. 764, Item 49)
